name: dialog
description: An accessible modal dialog with focus trap, Escape-to-close, aria-modal, and return-focus (WAI-ARIA APG dialog pattern).
docs: Register <lv-dialog> by importing components/ui/dialog.ts from your entry point. Bind `open` to control visibility. Listen for `lv-close` to update state. Supply `heading` for a labelled dialog; use the `footer` slot for action buttons.
